name: Talked to insurance adjuster after injury in Cottonwood Heights, did I mess up?

mainEntity.name: Talked to insurance adjuster after injury in Cottonwood Heights, did I mess up?

acceptedAnswer.description: **Possibly—avoid recorded statements without lawyer; they seek denials.** Stick to facts[5]. **Key factors:** Don't admit fault or downplay. **Practical guidance:** Politely end calls, consult attorney before more talks, document what said. Record future interactions. **Lawyer shields from tricks.**
